round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Synthesized landscape and regulatory evidence to rule out Canada and confirm US location.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Integrated regulatory and linguistic evidence to distinguish US from Mexico.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Used cross-agent evidence to resolve ambiguity between US and Mexico.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Combined linguistic and landscape data to strengthen US identification.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Synthesized all domain evidence to provide a definitive conclusion.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized evidence from all agents. It explicitly ruled out Canada based on landscape/botany and Mexico based on regulatory/commercial evidence, leading to the correct conclusion.
